text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Greetings, fair trainer! My day off<n>was filled with
utter bliss.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I spent the morning pouring over fan<n>letters that
sang me the highest<n>praises.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
In the afternoon, I had a photo<n>session for a
special issue of<n>collectible prints that shall serve
as<n>fine gifts for those fans.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
At night, I set off to dreamland under<n>the watchful
eye of my framed<n>portrait.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I feel refreshed in both mind and<n>body!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I shall commit myself fully to<n>today's
training! Haaah ha ha ha ha<n>ha!
